# PubFi Docs

Public documentation for PubFi's agent-native crypto data layer.

## Core Docs

- Docs home: https://docs.pubfi.ai/docs
- Project overview: https://docs.pubfi.ai/docs/project-overview
- Quickstart: https://docs.pubfi.ai/docs/getting-started/quickstart
- API reference guide: https://docs.pubfi.ai/docs/reference/api-reference
- Agent interface: https://docs.pubfi.ai/docs/reference/agent-interface
- Agent-readable surfaces: https://docs.pubfi.ai/docs/agent-readable/surfaces

## Runtime References

- Interactive API reference: https://api.pubfi.ai/reference
- OpenAPI schema: https://api.pubfi.ai/openapi.json
- MCP manifest: https://mcp.pubfi.ai/.well-known/mcp.json

## Product Surfaces

- Product site: https://pubfi.ai
- Discovery: https://pubfi.ai/discovery
- Agent interface guide: https://docs.pubfi.ai/docs/reference/agent-interface
- Agent-readable surfaces: https://docs.pubfi.ai/docs/agent-readable/surfaces

## Boundary

Discovery inclusion does not imply gateway availability. Route planning does not authorize
execution. Public docs and reachability checks do not prove ranking, traffic, or AI citation
success.
